CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Continued To Jun-18-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Richard Michael Lieberman, Esq.415-929-3197 for Plaintiff.
Matthew Yan, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3845, Office of the City Attorney David Chiu for Defendant.
Court reporter: Brianna Rudd, CSR #13668, 209-747-1306, briannarudd@gmail.com, Reported.

ARGUED. Mr. Yan contests the second, fourth, eighth, ninth, tenth and twelfth causes of action. Mr. Lieberman responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Demurrer to Plaintiff Jovan Thomas's First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Brianna Rudd, CSR #13668, 209-747-1306, briannarudd@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Continued To Apr-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Continued To Feb-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Patricia Henle, Esq. 415-929-3197 Law Office of Michael Lieberman for Plaintiff.
Matthew K. Yan, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800, Office of the City Attorney, for Defendant. (In-person)

ARGUED. Defendant contests the tentative ruling and requests for a continuance. The Court passes the matter for Counsel to bring proof of the delivery of courtesy copies.

The matter is recalled. Mr. Yan submits the hard courtesy copies of the demurrer - notice, memo, declaration and the reply in Open Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling. The matter is continued to 2/24/25 at 9am.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Nov-21-2024 Continued To Feb-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
